metadata.claim_text: Knee PJI workup parallels hip PJI but adds ROM and extensor integrity assessment.

Present indication, relevant imaging, implant/fixation concepts, and escalation pathway for knee prosthetic joint infection.

metadata.action: Coordinate aspiration and discuss I&D with liner exchange versus staged revision
